hooks.prompt: Note: The imperium-startup plugin is active. You have access to 9 domain skills (CEO, CTO, Product, Marketing, Sales/GTM, Finance, Founder, Legal, Engineering), 5 sub-agents, 9 slash commands, and a 10-book knowledge base. Auto-detect the relevant domain from user queries and apply the appropriate skill knowledge. Available commands: /imperium:validate-idea, /imperium:pitch-deck, /imperium:fundraise-prep, /imperium:cold-email, /imperium:competitor-matrix, /imperium:pricing-strategy, /imperium:gtm-plan, /imperium:metrics-dashboard, /imperium:founder-kb
